zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Doane II於1384年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir John Donne36歲，母親Anne de Heiton30歲。他於1411年11月16日與Lady Elizabeth Dutton在英國英格蘭爾達頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1440年在英國英格蘭爾武特金頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾武特金頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Doane II于1384年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir John Donne36岁，母亲Anne de Heiton30岁。他于1411年11月16日与Lady Elizabeth Dutton在英国英格兰爾達頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1440年在英国英格兰爾武特金頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin ‘descendant of Dubhán’, meaning ‘the little black one’, a common name in the 16th century in southern Ireland, or Ó Damháin ‘descendant of Damhán’ meaning ‘fawn, little stag’, a rare Ulster name. See also Devine .

variants.name: Dwan
meanings: Irish (Tipperary and Offaly): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin or Ó Damháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Duane
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin or Ó Damháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Doan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Duc, Minh, Trung, Vinh, Dung, Huong, Quang, Khanh, Long, Tan, Hong, Hang, Chan, Chien, Han, Man, Chi, Chin, Dong, Lung, Mija, Ming.
Vietnamese (Đoàn): from the Chinese surname 段, see Duan 1 and 4 below.

variants.name: Devine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Cormac, Donal, Finbar, Seamus, Conan, John Patrick, Padraic, Patrick Michael.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of either of two Gaelic names, Ó Duibhín ‘descendant of Duibhín’, a byname meaning ‘little black one’, or Ó Daimhín ‘descendant of Daimhín’, a byname meaning ‘little stag, little ox’. These are attenuated versions of Ó Dubháin and Ó Damháin, and are the phonetic origin of Anglicized forms with an internal v (as opposed to w, as in Dewan , or monosyllabic forms with an o or u) (see Doane ). Compare Devin 1.
English, Irish, and French: variant of   Devin   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Doane II was born in 1384, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Donne, was 36 and his mother, Anne de Heiton, was 30. He married Lady Elizabeth Dutton on 16 November 1411, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1440, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Doane II est né en 1384, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Donne, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne de Heiton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Dutton le 16 novembre 1411, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1440, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Doane II 1384 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Donne 36 und seine Mutter Anne de Heiton 30. Er hat am 16. November 1411 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1440 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Doane II è nato il nel 1384 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Donne, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anne de Heiton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Dutton il 16 novembre 1411, nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1440, nel Utkinton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Utikinton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John Doane IIが1384年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Donneは36歳，母Anne de Heitonは30歳であった。1411年11月16日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンでLady Elizabeth Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1440年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Doane II(이)가 1384년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Donne(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Heiton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1411년 11월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우트킨턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Doane II nasceu em 1384, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Donne, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Heiton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Dutton em 16 de novembro de 1411, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Doane II родился в 1384 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Donne было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Heiton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Dutton 16 ноября 1411 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1440 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Doane II nació en 1384, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Donne, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne de Heiton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Dutton el 16 de noviembre de 1411, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1440, en Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
